entity.summary: Avalanche ecosystem decentralized exchange application represented by a dedicated first-party web domain and independently indexed DEX identity.
entity.notes: Current first-party HunnySwap domain is reachable. DefiLlama candidate data independently identifies HunnySwap as an Avalanche DEX. Confidence remains medium because detailed public first-party protocol documentation is thin in this review pass.

evidence.title: HunnySwap official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party HunnySwap domain is reachable at review time.

evidence.title: HunnySwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies HunnySwap as an Avalanche decentralized exchange, corroborating the first-party domain identity.

evidence.title: HunnySwap candidate registry context
evidence.notes: Protocol registry context supplements the DEX-volume discovery source for conservative active exchange classification; no detailed lifecycle claim is asserted.
